data.title: Tether Gold (XAU₮) now backed by 7.66 tons of gold in Q2 2025, solidifying its status as a top gold-backed token.
data.description: Tether Gold (XAU₮) has solidified its standing as a top gold-backed digital token by securing over 7.66 tons of gold support, showcasing its durability in the face of economic instability.

data.title: DOGE price drops to $0.23, down 7.15% in 24h despite institutional interest. Volatility spikes as profit-taking pressure clashes with buying.
data.description: The price of DOGE has dropped to $0.23 following a significant sell-off, marking a 7.15% decrease in the last 24 hours. The market is experiencing conflicting signals as institutional purchases are met with substantial profit-taking activities.

data.title: Kioxia starts shipping samples of 512Gb BiCS FLASHTM 3D TLC devices, aiming for mass production in FY 2025.
data.description: In Tokyo, Kioxia Corporation, a prominent memory solutions provider, revealed that it has started sending out samples of 512Gb Triple-Level Cell (TLC) memory units that utilize its advanced 9th generation BiCS FLASHTM 3D flash memory technology. The company aims to begin large-scale production in the fiscal year 2025. These devices are specifically developed to cater to applications that demand superior performance and remarkable power efficiency within the low to mid-level storage capacities. The 512Gb TLC memory devices are set to be integrated into various systems.

data.title: Frontera Energy Corp to announce Q2 2025 results on Aug 13; ended June 30, 2025. Conference call scheduled.
data.description: Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) based in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed that it will unveil its financial and operational performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025, post market closure on Wednesday, August 13, 2025. This information was provided by the company itself, and not directly released from the source.

data.title: Solana (SOL) dips to $181 from $200, down 4.56% daily. Key support at $146, bullish momentum remains strong.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SOL is currently trading at $181.81, a decrease of 4.56% in the daily trading. Earlier in the week, it rose above $200. Although experiencing a slight decline in the short term, technical indicators suggest a positive momentum in the market.

data.title: By 2025, Raytron emerges as the top thermal camera manufacturer driven by AI and miniaturization for infrared imaging.
data.description: On July 25, 2025 in Munich, Germany, advanced infrared thermal imaging technology was discussed regarding its role in helping vehicles avoid collisions and assisting engineers in visualizing heat signatures that are otherwise invisible to the human eye. This technology is crucial for enhancing safety and efficiency, especially in situations where visibility is poor, such as total darkness. By translating heat into actionable data, it enables vehicles to navigate effectively and for engineers to analyze crucial information.

data.title: Cannabix Tech AGM Results: SHIM & Associates LLP as auditors, election of 5 directors announced.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 24, 2025, Cannabix Technologies Inc. (CSE: BLO) (OTC PINK: BLOZF) shared outcomes from its annual general and special shareholder gathering. The event, which took place in Vancouver, saw key resolutions approved. These encompassed the selection of SHIM and Associates LLP as auditors for the upcoming year. Moreover, shareholders voted in five directors: Dr. Raj Attariwala, Dr. Phillip Olla, Ravinder Mlait, Bryan Loree, and William Corl.
